titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of TNA DL 25/90

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=858 status=reviewed modified=2023-03-13 15:02:37.081433+00 | translation moa=859 status=reviewed modified=2023-03-13 15:02:37.068457+00

p.cl:
Sciant presentes et futuri quod Hec conuencio inter Willelmum de Brus dominum . et Willelmum de Heiueuill’ . silicet quod
ego Willelmus de Brus ...Willelmo de Heynevill’ et heredibus suis illam terram que est uersus logan ultra Blakebec et illam
terram que est inter aybeg’ bec et logan . ?sicut Aybegbec ca?dit in Serke . et ... vallem ...serke .. usque Raburn
et a parte ... de serke quantum diuise ... ...d’ prout ei placuere concedo etiam ei et heredibus
suis illas ... ... patris mei et fratris mei Roberti de Brus . concedo
.etiam . ill... terram inter Blabeok... ... patris mei . et fratris mei excole... ...
. etiam . ei con... ... pasturam in bosco in p... ...tuti ... habuit in tempore patris mei et fratris mei ... tempore ... ...ill’
de he... ... remittit in commune pasturam mihi . illas terras que de nouo fuerunt culte et edificate sicut
terras in quibus Ius non habebat nisi per mandatum meum . volo etiam . et precipio ut homines mei habeant communionem
de bosco et de pastura inter ipsum et illos . sicut habuerunt tempore patris mei .
testis Hudard de Hodolm et c.

Let present and future know that this agreement between William de Brus, lord, and William de Heineville, that is, which I, William de Brus ... to William de Heineville and his heirs that land which is towards Logan above Blakebec and that land which is between Aybeg bec and Logan just as Aybegbec falls into the Serk, and ... the valley ... Serk ... as far as the Raeburn, and from the side ... from Serke as the boundaries ... so as to please him I grant to him and his heirs those ... ... of my father and my brother Robert de Brus; I also grant that land between Blabeok ... ... of my father and my brother ... ... also, I grant to him ... ... pasture in wood, in meadow ... ... he remits in common pasture to me those lands which were ploughed and settled from new just as the lands in which he had no right unless by my mandate. I also will and enjoin that my men have common right of the wood and of the pasture between him and them, just as they had in the time of my father.
